response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and tooling experience with a focus on developer experience, but his background lacks deep, recent JVM/IDE-specific expertise. His open-source contributions and tooling work (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts) show potential alignment with IDE development, but the role requires more direct experience with enterprise Java/Kotlin frameworks and IDE internals.
strengths: Broad tooling and developer-experience expertise (e.g., open-source projects, test frameworks, CI/CD).
Proven track record in designing extensible, testable systems across diverse domains (web, mobile, embedded).
Strong collaboration and knowledge-sharing skills (workshops, talks, community contributions).
concerns: Limited recent experience with Java/Kotlin or enterprise JVM frameworks (Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate).
No explicit mention of IDE development or language tooling in professional roles.
Diverse but fragmented technical background may dilute focus on core IDE/JVM requirements.
